hypotheses.title: YAP-BRD4 Condensate Size Supralinearly Encodes ECM Stiffness, Creating a Mechanical Switch at Mechanoenhancers
hypotheses.core_claim: YAP nuclear concentration increases ~linearly with ECM stiffness. BRD4-YAP-MED1 phase-separated condensate assembly at mechanoenhancers is cooperative (Hill coefficient n=2-4), creating supralinear transcriptional amplification functioning as a mechanical threshold switch at ~8-15 kPa.
hypotheses.primary_prediction: Transcriptional output of mechanoenhancer-controlled genes on 5-point stiffness gradient fits power law (output proportional to stiffness^n, n>1.5) better than linear. BRD4 condensate volume scales supralinearly with nuclear YAP. JQ1 linearizes the relationship.
hypotheses.test_protocol: smFISH for CTGF/CYR61 + nuclear YAP quantification across 5-point stiffness gradient (1, 5, 10, 20, 50 kPa); STORM for BRD4 condensate volume at CYR61 locus; JQ1 linearization test.
wounds: YAP nuclear concentration may plateau >20 kPa
BRD4 condensate nature (LLPS vs cluster) debated

hypotheses.title: Two-Phase Mechanoenhancer Activation Constitutes a Temporal Coincidence Gate
hypotheses.core_claim: Phase 1 (Piezo1 -> CaMKII -> HDAC4/5 export -> EP300 freed -> H3K27ac, <15 min) is a PREREQUISITE for Phase 2 (YAP -> BRD4 condensate nucleation, 30-120 min) because BRD4 bromodomain requires H3K27ac marks for condensate anchoring. The two phases are not parallel but sequentially dependent.
hypotheses.primary_prediction: Piezo1 KO reduces H3K27ac at mechanoenhancers at BOTH 15 min AND 120 min. Piezo1 KO reduces BRD4 CUT&RUN at mechanoenhancers at 120 min. dCas9-p300 targeted to CYR61 mechanoenhancer in Piezo1 KO rescues BRD4 condensate nucleation.
hypotheses.test_protocol: Piezo1 KO CRISPR + CUT&RUN for H3K27ac/BRD4 time course (0, 15, 30, 60, 120 min) on 50 kPa hydrogels; dCas9-p300 rescue at CYR61 mechanoenhancer.
key_citations: Backs et al. 2006 J Clin Invest
BRD4 heterogeneous nucleation Mol Biol Cell 2024 PMC11238092
wounds: HDAC5 not directly CaMKII-responsive (requires HDAC4 hetero-oligomer)

hypotheses.title: MRTF-A Preferentially Occupies Mechanoenhancers over Promoters on Stiff ECM, Defining a Non-TEAD Mechanical Enhancer Program
hypotheses.core_claim: MRTF-A binds CaRG-box motifs at mechanoenhancers preferentially over promoters on stiff ECM, directly recruiting EP300 (STRING 0.710) to deposit H3K27ac, activating a cytoskeletal/contractility mechanoenhancer program distinct from YAP/TEAD.
hypotheses.primary_prediction: MRTF-A ChIP-seq on 1 vs 50 kPa hydrogels shows enrichment at CaRG-box mechanoenhancers. MRTF-A siRNA reduces H3K27ac at CaRG-box but not TEAD mechanoenhancers.
hypotheses.test_protocol: MRTF-A ChIP-seq in fibroblasts on 1 vs 50 kPa hydrogels; peak annotation (promoter vs enhancer); intersect with Cosgrove 2025 catalog.
wounds: Existing MRTF ChIP-seq shows promoter-dominant binding
No mechanism for enhancer redistribution on stiff ECM
hypotheses.condition: Requires MRTF-A ChIP-seq under ECM stiffness conditions to resolve promoter vs enhancer binding ratio

hypotheses.title: KDM6B-Mediated Bivalent Mechanoenhancer Resolution as Epigenetic Ratchet in IPF Fibrosis
hypotheses.core_claim: In cells retaining epigenetic plasticity (IPF fibroblasts, MSCs), a subset of mechanoenhancers carries bivalent chromatin (H3K4me1+H3K27me3) on soft ECM. ECM stiffening activates KDM6B, converting bivalent mechanoenhancers to active state.
hypotheses.primary_prediction: H3K27me3 detectable at mechanoenhancer subset in IPF fibroblasts on soft ECM; lost on stiff ECM; KDM6B knockdown on stiff ECM maintains H3K27me3; NORMAL fibroblasts show NO H3K27me3 at same loci.
hypotheses.test_protocol: CUT&RUN for H3K27me3 and H3K27ac time course (0,1,2,4,8h after soft->stiff transfer) in IPF vs normal fibroblasts +/- KDM6B siRNA.
wounds: Bivalent marks at mechanoenhancers in IPF not yet confirmed
KDM6B studied at promoters not enhancers
hypotheses.condition: Requires CUT&RUN confirmation that bivalent H3K27me3 exists at mechanoenhancer loci in IPF fibroblasts

hypotheses.title: YAP-BRD4 Condensate Volume Threshold Drives Looping-Independent Multi-Enhancer Hub Formation
hypotheses.core_claim: The 86.2% of mechanoenhancer-gene connections lacking annotated loops are regulated via condensate-volume-dependent spatial co-localization. Above critical stiffness (~8-15 kPa), YAP-BRD4 condensate volume crosses a threshold sufficient to capture multiple non-looped mechanoenhancers.
hypotheses.primary_prediction: Non-looped mechanoenhancer pairs show <300 nm proximity on stiff ECM; NOT abolished by RAD21 knockdown; IS abolished by IDR-deleted YAP mutant; absent on soft ECM.
hypotheses.test_protocol: Oligopaint FISH for 5 non-looped mechanoenhancer pairs (stiff vs soft vs IDR-deleted YAP); STORM imaging.
wounds: Condensates in fibroblasts on hydrogels unverified
hypotheses.condition: Requires Oligopaint FISH demonstrating stiffness-dependent spatial proximity at non-looped mechanoenhancer loci

hypotheses.title: Lamin A/C Concentration Sets the Cell-Intrinsic Stiffness-Sensing Threshold for Mechanoenhancer Activation
hypotheses.core_claim: On uniform-stiffness substrates, cells with low lamin A/C activate mechanoenhancer H3K27ac at lower ECM stiffness than cells with high lamin A/C. Lamin A/C acts as cell-intrinsic rheostat calibrating stiffness-sensing threshold.
hypotheses.primary_prediction: scCUT&RUN for H3K27ac at CYR61 on 10 kPa shows bimodal distribution; ON cells have lower lamin A/C; lamin A overexpression shifts EC50 right; knockdown shifts left.
hypotheses.test_protocol: scCUT&RUN for H3K27ac + quantitative IF for lamin A/C on 5-point stiffness gradient; EC50 shift measurements.
wounds: Core concept (lamin A -> YAP threshold) already published 2024
Only mechanoenhancer H3K27ac extension is new
hypotheses.condition: Must demonstrate extension beyond published 2024 Nat Comms findings at mechanoenhancer-specific resolution
